_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex.

_contextSnippet: the mean Spearman correlation between the total cNF-Skindex score and the items of the EQ-5D-5L was 0.30...The Spearman correlation between the total cNF-Skindex score and the EQ-5D-5L VAS was − 0.32 (p-value = 0.012)
details: Convergent validity with EQ-5D-5L showing mean Spearman correlation of 0.30 with individual items and correlation of -0.32 with VAS (p=0.012)
